    <div class="inner-wrap kern-container kern-container-no-padding">
        
    
    
    
    
    

    <section class="banner">
        <div class="banner-content">
            
                <h2 class="h1 banner-headline">
                    Was ist los <br>in <span class="oldb-no-hyphen">Oldenburg</span>?
                </h2>
            

            
                <p class="banner-subheader">
                    <span class="oldb-no-hyphen">Oldenburg</span>, das kulturelle Zentrum im Nordwesten
                </p>
            

            
                <a href="/startseite/kultur/veranstaltungen/was-ist-los-in-oldenburg.html" class="banner-link kern-btn kern-btn--primary">
                    <span class="kern-label">
                        Zu den Veranstaltungen
                    </span>
                </a>
            
        </div>

<script>
    /**
 * @author Ralf Zimmermann <ralf.zimmermann@tritum.de>
 */

var TRITUM = TRITUM || {};
TRITUM.SitePackage = TRITUM.SitePackage || {};
TRITUM.SitePackage.loadCSSDone = false;

/*!
 Modified for brevity from https://github.com/filamentgroup/loadCSS
 loadCSS: load a CSS file asynchronously.
 [c]2014 @scottjehl, Filament Group, Inc.
 Licensed MIT
 */
function loadCSS(href) {
    var tag = window.document.createElement('link'),
        ref = window.document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0];

    tag.rel = 'stylesheet';
    tag.href = href;

    // temporarily, set media to something non-matching to ensure it'll
    // fetch without blocking render
    tag.media = 'only x';

    var firstLink = document.querySelector('link[rel="stylesheet"]');
    if (firstLink) {
        ref.insertBefore(tag, firstLink);
    } else {
        ref.appendChild(tag);
    }

    setTimeout(function () {
        // set media back to `all` so that the stylesheet applies once it loads
        tag.media = 'all';
        TRITUM.SitePackage.loadCSSDone = true;
    }, 0);
}

loadCSS("https://www.oldenburg.de/_assets/d51d5b1ffc2849ec04f63985bc7d752e/StyleSheets/Build/screen.1783947800.css");

</script>
